evals.prompt:
You are acting as the HERMES Clarifier agent. Your job is to conduct the intake protocol for a new reverse engineering session.

The Conductor has passed you these initial parameters:
- target: "módulo de checkout de um app web de e-commerce"
- level: L2
- source: "código-fonte em ../ecommerce-project"

Conduct the full intake using the skill-clarifier skill. Here is a simulated conversation with the user:

[After your Rodada 1 questions, the user replies]
Usuário: "Quero documentar o fluxo completo de checkout — desde a tela de resumo do carrinho até a confirmação do pedido. O objetivo é entregar para outro time reimplementar do zero. Pode excluir a integração com o Stripe SDK, isso é caixa-preta. O frontend usa Next.js 14 com App Router. Tem também um módulo de cálculo de frete que fica na borda do checkout, inclua ele."

[After your Rodada 2 questions, the user replies]
Usuário: "O código está em ../ecommerce-project. Roda local em http://localhost:3000. Credenciais de teste: checkout_test@example.com / senha: Checkout@2026. O backend é uma API separada em ../ecommerce-api."

[After your Rodada 3 questions, the user replies]
Usuário: "Não tem dados confidenciais de clientes reais no ambiente de desenvolvimento. Por favor assuma que a recriação vai usar Next.js 14 também, e o banco vai ser PostgreSQL."

Now complete the full intake protocol:
1. Show your domain and target-type classification
2. Show your Rodada 1 questions (all in one message, batched)
3. Show your reflection/confirmation after the user's Rodada 1 response
4. Show your Rodada 2 questions (all in one message)
5. Show your reflection/confirmation after Rodada 2 response
6. Show your Rodada 3 questions
7. Show your reflection/confirmation after Rodada 3 response
8. Write the final scope.md to outputs/scope.md
9. Write the final glossary.md to outputs/glossary.md
10. Show the CLARIFIER CONCLUÍDO signal
evals.expected_output: scope.md with correct target type 'module', exclusion of Stripe SDK, level L2, Next.js 14 and PostgreSQL as tech assumptions. glossary.md capturing domain terms like 'módulo de frete'. Questions asked in batches. Web-domain and module-type specific questions included.
expectations: Domain correctly identified as Web (Next.js)
Target type correctly classified as 'module'
Questions are asked in batches (not one at a time)
At least one Web-domain specific question is asked (SSR/SSG, user profiles, or frontend/backend focus)
At least one module-specific question is asked (boundaries, integrations, or entry point)
scope.md is written to outputs/scope.md
scope.md contains Target Type = module
scope.md contains Exclusões section mentioning Stripe
scope.md contains Restrições with Next.js 14 as technology assumption
glossary.md is written to outputs/glossary.md
glossary.md captures at least one domain term (e.g., módulo de frete, checkout)
Reflection/confirmation is performed after at least one rodada
CLARIFIER CONCLUÍDO signal is shown at the end

evals.prompt:
You are acting as the HERMES Clarifier agent. Your job is to conduct the intake protocol for a new reverse engineering session.

The Conductor has passed you these initial parameters:
- target: "aplicativo mobile de delivery de comida"
- level: L1
- source: "APK disponível em /Downloads/delivery-app-v3.2.1.apk"

Conduct the full intake using the skill-clarifier skill. Here is a simulated conversation with the user:

[After your Rodada 1 questions, the user replies]
Usuário: "Quero documentar o app inteiro — todas as telas e fluxos principais. O objetivo é ter um SDD para onboarding de novos devs no time. Não precisa incluir o painel de admin (é uma web app separada). O app é React Native com Expo, suporta iOS e Android."

[After your Rodada 2 questions, the user replies]
Usuário: "Tenho o código-fonte também, fica em ../delivery-mobile. O APK é para análise complementar. O emulador Android está configurado. Não precisa de credenciais especiais, tem um modo de demonstração."

[After your Rodada 3 questions, the user replies]
Usuário: "Nenhuma informação confidencial. Para recriação, pode assumir React Native com Expo. O backend não precisa ser documentado agora."

Now complete the full intake protocol:
1. Show your domain and target-type classification
2. Show your Rodada 1 questions (all in one message, batched)
3. Show your reflection/confirmation after the user's Rodada 1 response
4. Show your Rodada 2 questions (all in one message)
5. Show your reflection/confirmation after Rodada 2 response
6. Show your Rodada 3 questions
7. Show your reflection/confirmation after Rodada 3 response
8. Write the final scope.md to outputs/scope.md
9. Write the final glossary.md to outputs/glossary.md
10. Show the CLARIFIER CONCLUÍDO signal
evals.expected_output: scope.md with target type 'app', exclusion of admin panel, level L1, source combination (APK + source code), React Native/Expo as tech assumption. glossary.md capturing relevant terms. Mobile-domain specific questions about iOS/Android, navigation, offline flows.
expectations: Domain correctly identified as Mobile (React Native/Expo)
Target type correctly classified as 'app'
Questions are asked in batches (not one at a time)
At least one Mobile-domain specific question is asked (iOS/Android platforms, navigation type, or offline flows)
App-type specific question is asked (critical flows or out-of-scope modules)
scope.md is written to outputs/scope.md
scope.md contains Target Type = app
scope.md contains Exclusões mentioning painel de admin
scope.md contains source type combination (APK + source_code)
glossary.md is written to outputs/glossary.md
Reflection/confirmation is performed after at least one rodada
CLARIFIER CONCLUÍDO signal is shown at the end

evals.prompt:
You are acting as the HERMES Clarifier agent. Your job is to conduct the intake protocol for a new reverse engineering session.

The Conductor has passed you these initial parameters:
- target: "nossa API"
- level: L3
- source: "código em /srv/api"

Note: the target is intentionally vague ('nossa API'). The skill should help you ask the right questions to disambiguate.

Conduct the full intake using the skill-clarifier skill. Here is a simulated conversation with the user:

[After your Rodada 1 questions, the user replies]
Usuário: "É uma API REST feita em NestJS. Quero documentar os endpoints de gestão de assinaturas — criação, upgrade, cancelamento e renovação. O objetivo é migrar esse módulo para uma nova plataforma. Pode excluir os endpoints de billing/cobrança que são delegados para o Stripe."

[After your Rodada 2 questions, the user replies]
Usuário: "Não tem spec OpenAPI atualizada, ficou desatualizada faz uns 6 meses. Use o código-fonte em /srv/api. A API roda em staging em https://api-staging.example.internal. Auth via JWT Bearer token — posso gerar um token de serviço, me avise se precisar. Todos os endpoints relevantes ficam em /subscriptions."

[After your Rodada 3 questions, the user replies]
Usuário: "Não tem dados de clientes reais no staging. Para migração, o time quer manter NestJS + TypeScript. O banco é PostgreSQL com Prisma."

Now complete the full intake protocol:
1. Show your domain and target-type classification
2. Show your Rodada 1 questions (all in one message, batched)
3. Show your reflection/confirmation after the user's Rodada 1 response
4. Show your Rodada 2 questions (all in one message)
5. Show your reflection/confirmation after Rodada 2 response
6. Show your Rodada 3 questions
7. Show your reflection/confirmation after Rodada 3 response
8. Write the final scope.md to outputs/scope.md
9. Write the final glossary.md to outputs/glossary.md
10. Show the CLARIFIER CONCLUÍDO signal
evals.expected_output: scope.md with target type 'api', clear scope of /subscriptions endpoints, exclusion of Stripe billing, NestJS+TypeScript+Prisma tech stack. glossary.md capturing terms like 'assinatura', 'upgrade', 'cancelamento', 'renovação'. Backend API domain questions about OpenAPI spec, environments, and contract vs implementation.
expectations: Domain correctly identified as Backend API (NestJS/REST)
Target type correctly classified as 'api'
Questions are asked in batches (not one at a time)
At least one Backend API domain question is asked (OpenAPI spec, environments, or contract vs implementation)
API-type specific question is asked (which endpoints/resources, or contract vs logic)
scope.md is written to outputs/scope.md
scope.md contains Target Type = api
scope.md contains Exclusões mentioning Stripe billing
scope.md contains source type and staging URL
glossary.md is written to outputs/glossary.md
glossary.md captures business domain terms (assinatura, upgrade, cancelamento, or renovação)
Reflection/confirmation is performed after at least one rodada
CLARIFIER CONCLUÍDO signal is shown at the end
